purpose: Classify carbonx-backend as HG-2B candidate; characterise soak readiness gaps
findings: FINDING: authority_class discrepancy — codex rollout assumed "external_call" — services.json actual="financial". Financial authority class has higher accountability requirements than external_call. Candidate profile must use actual value.
FINDING: blast_radius discrepancy — codex rollout assumed "BR-3" — services.json actual="BR-5". BR-5 is parali-central class, not BR-3. Soak doctrine applies in full.

FINDING: runtime_readiness tier discrepancy — codex rollout assumed "TIER-A" — services.json runtime_readiness.tier="TIER-C". TIER-C = scan-first: code scan must complete before trust_mask enforcement. This is a soak readiness blocker.

FINDING: needs_code_scan=true — carbonx-backend has not yet had a code-level dependency scan. Technical blast radius shows BR-0 (no code deps found) vs semantic BR-5. Divergence must be resolved before soft-canary 1/7 begins. This is the primary soak readiness gap for Batch 63+.

FINDING: HG-2C undefined — No HG-2C policy exists yet. carbonx financial settlement risk (SUBMIT_ETS_SURRENDER) may eventually warrant HG-2C doctrine. For now: classify HG-2B + financial_settlement_doctrine=true. Reassess after soak evidence from Batches 63-69.

soak_readiness_blockers: needs_code_scan=true: resolve technical vs semantic blast radius divergence

metadata_discrepancy.discrepancy_impact: Soak doctrine (full HG-2B) applies; financial_settlement_doctrine addendum required

blockers: needs_code_scan=true: technical vs semantic blast radius unresolved
soak_readiness.gate_for_batch_63: Complete code scan → resolve technical_blast_radius → confirm dependency graph → then declare CARBONX_HG2B_POLICY
